name: Proxy 3D Chamber
summary: The Puffco Proxy 3D Chamber prioritizes flavour with its innovative heating system.
description: The Puffco Proxy 3D Chamber prioritizes flavour with its innovative heating system. Unlike traditional chambers, the heating traces are located along the side walls instead of the bottom, allowing for better preservation of oil and an enhanced dabbing experience. This feature is one of the many reasons why the Puffco Proxy modular vaporiser stands out as a top-of-the-line dabbing device. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
